task_description: Add a lightweight LLM integration to MK OS in MK_OS/llm/ folder. Provides hardware detection (RAM check), server connectivity for both Ollama and llama.cpp, graceful fallback to rule-based processing, model download script, and boot-time status messages.

verification.summary: Build compiles cleanly. All 10 tests pass (74 assertions). Tests exercise real hardware RAM detection, graceful LLM server fallback, and preprocessor model integration. No Docker available.
